title: Crew user-level defaults
description: Optional per-user standing preferences, read by `/crew:init` and layered UNDER project detection. Lives at ~/.claude/crew/defaults.json (never committed to a repo). Precedence: project profile > detected values > these user defaults > plugin defaults. Every field is optional; a partial file is valid.

planDir.description: Preferred plan dir for new projects.

visualQA.description: Standing visual-QA preference. Only `tool` is a sane user default; `target`/`startCommand` are always per-project.

conventions.description: Default conventions doc to look for, and/or standing notes to seed a new project's profile.

docRef.description: In-repo conventions doc init should look for first (e.g. AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md).

models.description: Standing per-role model tier, copied into a new project's profile unless detection/interview overrides. 'inherit' uses the session model.

personas.description: Preferred persona skin for new projects. Copy a shipped preset's map or set custom names.

permissions.description: Extra permission entries init should append to a project's .claude/settings.json, on top of the plugin baseline.
